{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set activeNavigation = "Add licences or give access" %} {% set licence = data['licences'][data.ID] %} {% set pageName="Add your licences to the service" %} {% block containerStart %} {{ govukBackLink({ text: "Back", href: "/external/manage-licences" }) }} {% endblock %} {% block content %}

{{ pageName }}

You can enter one or many of your licence numbers

{{ govukTextarea({ id: "addedLicences", name: "addedLicences", classes: "govuk-textarea govuk-!-width-three-quarters", hint: { text: "Separate the numbers with spaces, commas, or by entering them on different lines." }, value: data.addedLicences if data.addedLicences else "" }) }} {{ govukButton({ text: "Continue", href: "/external/no-page.html" }) }} {{ govukDetails({ summaryText: "Do you need help?", html: "Please contact us for help.
Email: enquiries@environment-agency.gov.uk
Telephone: 03708 506 506
Telephone from outside the UK: +44 114 282 5312
You can call us from 8am to 6pm, Monday to Friday." }) }}
{% endblock %}
